positive: A stylized, high-contrast depiction of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) standing amidst glowing cosmic geometric patterns. The fox has a graceful, dynamic silhouette with multi-layered tails and luminous gold accents. The background features swirling nebula dust, constellations, and subtle mandala-like energy flows. The overall style is 'Neo-Tokyo Mysticism' blending Art Nouveau floral curves with sci-fi bioluminescence. Use deep indigo, iridescent cyan, and striking gold for the color palette. The composition must be centered and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, strong outlines, vector-art feel. Minimalistic yet intricate details, focusing on clear shapes and bold negative space.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, low resolution, extra limbs, poorly drawn, disfigured, cartoon, photo, realistic photography, muted colors, cluttered
